ElasticNetworkCardMountedCloudProductIns.eniId: The ID of the elastic network interface
ElasticNetworkCardMountedCloudProductIns.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of no more than 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
ElasticNetworkCardMountedCloudProductIns.instanceId: The ID of the bound cloud product instance
ElasticNetworkCardMountedCloudProductIns.instanceType: The type of the bound cloud product instance. Valid values: server / hpas, representing cloud server / HPAS respectively. Default value: server
